variants: Clotilde Lebrun exemplifies professional excellence with her holding of the Dreamscape Mixologist Badge, attained through her dedicated work in her field. Her academic mentorship came from Aurora Altman, her doctoral advisor, who played a pivotal role in shaping her career trajectory. Financial backing from the Silica Dream Initiative has enabled Clotilde to further explore her research interests. She has also contributed her findings to the Evergreen Stones Imprint, marking her presence in prominent academic circles. In addition to her professional commitments, Clotilde is actively involved with the Serendipity Foundation, highlighting her engagement in community service.
